features.name: module_output_to_multi_wire_concatenation
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where an output port is connected to a concatenation that spans multiple distinct wires

features.name: wire_slice_self_reference_with_replication
features.description: Code should include a part-select assignment where the right-hand side uses a bit from the same wire being assigned, combined with replication operator

features.name: signed_multiplication_feed_split_concatenation
features.description: Code should include a signed multiplication result that is split across multiple wires via concatenation, with one of the source bits used in a self-referential slice assignment
